name: Mailcow
description: Mailcow is a Docker-based open source groupware/email suite providing a full-featured mail server with web administration, webmail (SOGo), antispam (Rspamd), antivirus (ClamAV), and more.

notes.text: Requires a valid FQDN with proper DNS records (A, MX, SPF, DKIM, DMARC) pointing to the container IP.
Change the default admin password immediately after first login!
Ensure ports 25, 80, 143, 443, 465, 587, 993, 995, 4190 are not blocked by your firewall.
